integration_evidence.summary: Core exposes recordRealSiteWritePreviewResult to turn write-precheck task submissions and refs-only Lode/Harbor facts into queryable Run Records and preview result envelopes.
Core self-check validates Xiaohongshu draft preview, BOSS greeting preview, page_changed, user_cancelled, approval expired, no-submit guard, and submitted=false query behavior.
Validation commands, Loom fact-chain/suite evidence, current pointer boundary, and known tool-surface notes are recorded for review and PR readiness.

known_tool_surface_notes: CORE-231 implementation PR requires active .loom/status/current.md plus .loom/bootstrap/init-result.json fact_chain entry alignment; idle item-specific-only carrier mode caused build/review runtime evidence gaps.

After carrier alignment, loom build full-output shows runtime evidence, suite validate, suite carrier validate, and build-execution pass, but the wrapper still returns block because checkpoint-admission reports block with no missing inputs. Manual review fallback records the current-head review artifacts for PR gate consumption.
